description: Nostro balance mismatch USD 2.4M, GLRS feed not received by EOD
root_cause: SWIFT cut-off time difference caused feed delay
resolution: Manual adjustment posted, feed team notified, resolved next morning

description: MUREX position break vs settlement system, 500 trades unmatched
root_cause: Late trade booking missed settlement cut-off
resolution: Backdated entries raised, ops team confirmed match

description: CALYPSO cash break USD 1.2M wrong value date posted
root_cause: Holiday calendar not updated in system
resolution: Value date corrected and reposted by static data team

description: SWIFT feed delayed 4 hours, nostro opening balance incorrect
root_cause: SWIFT network maintenance window overran
resolution: Feed reprocessed manually, balance corrected

description: SUMMIT bond position mismatch vs custodian, 3 trades missing
root_cause: Custodian file arrived in wrong format, rejected by parser
resolution: Format issue fixed, file reloaded, positions matched

description: Enrichment failure on 200 FX trades, missing SSI data
root_cause: Counterparty SSI not updated after account change
resolution: SSI updated in static data, trades re-enriched and released

description: USD nostro account showing USD 5M surplus vs bank statement
root_cause: Duplicate posting from overnight batch job
resolution: Duplicate entry reversed, root cause fixed in batch config

description: CALYPSO interest payment break, 45 accounts affected
root_cause: Rate reset not applied due to system timeout
resolution: Batch rerun after timeout resolved, payments posted correctly

description: KONDOR FX position flat but P&L showing USD 300K loss
root_cause: Incorrect FX rate applied at revaluation
resolution: Rate corrected manually, P&L recalculated and reconciled

description: SWIFT MT202 messages not received, correspondent bank unmatched
root_cause: Firewall rule blocked incoming SWIFT messages for 2 hours
resolution: Firewall rule corrected, messages reprocessed, accounts balanced

description: MUREX trade feed to settlement system stopped at 3pm
root_cause: Database connection pool exhausted during peak load
resolution: Connection pool size increased, feed restarted, trades replayed

description: Bloomberg pricing feed delayed, 1200 bonds using stale prices
root_cause: Bloomberg API rate limit hit during batch pricing run
resolution: Pricing job rerun after rate limit reset, all bonds repriced

description: OPTIMA repo break USD 3.4M, collateral not returned on time
root_cause: Maturity date incorrect in trade capture
resolution: Trade amended, collateral returned, counterparty notified

description: GLRS nostro GBP account break, weekend accruals missing
root_cause: Accrual job skipped Saturday due to incorrect calendar config
resolution: Accruals posted manually for both days, calendar config fixed

description: SUMMIT equity position break, corporate action not applied
root_cause: Stock split event missed in corporate actions feed
resolution: Corporate action applied manually, position adjusted, custodian confirmed

description: CALYPSO failing to enrich 80 trades, missing legal entity data
root_cause: Legal entity merger not updated in reference data
resolution: Reference data updated, trades re-enriched automatically

description: MUREX USD cash break USD 1.7M open since Monday
root_cause: Funding instruction sent to wrong nostro account
resolution: Funds transferred to correct account, instruction template corrected

description: SWIFT feed received but GLRS rejected all messages, 0 posted
root_cause: GLRS schema version mismatch after weekend release
resolution: Schema updated in GLRS config, messages reprocessed successfully

description: KONDOR FX forward book position break vs confirmation system
root_cause: Confirmation system applied wrong settlement date convention
resolution: Settlement dates corrected in confirmation system, positions matched

description: Nostro JPY account USD equivalent break due to FX rate
root_cause: Overnight FX revaluation used previous day rate
resolution: Revaluation rerun with correct rate, JPY break resolved

description: MUREX equity trade feed stopped, 3 hours of trades missing
root_cause: Disk space exhausted on MUREX app server
resolution: Disk space freed, feed restarted, missing trades replayed from audit log

description: CALYPSO money market break, rollover not processed
root_cause: Automatic rollover job failed due to missing rate
resolution: Rate input manually, rollover processed, counterparty confirmed

description: SWIFT nostro statement arrived 6 hours late, reconciliation delayed
root_cause: Correspondent bank changed statement delivery time without notice
resolution: Reconciliation completed on delayed basis, correspondent bank notified

description: SUMMIT custodian break, 15 trades showing at custodian not in SUMMIT
root_cause: Batch job dropped trades with non-standard settlement codes
resolution: Settlement code mapping updated, missing trades loaded

description: OPTIMA collateral break, haircut calculated incorrectly
root_cause: Wrong haircut table applied after regulatory update
resolution: Correct haircut table loaded, margin calls recalculated

description: GLRS feed received but amounts in wrong currency
root_cause: Currency field mapping changed in upstream system without notification
resolution: Mapping corrected in GLRS parser, feed reprocessed

description: MUREX bond accrual break, 500 positions showing zero accrual
root_cause: Accrual basis flag set incorrectly after migration
resolution: Flag corrected on all affected positions, accruals recalculated

description: Bloomberg FX rate feed missing for 12 currency pairs
root_cause: Bloomberg subscription lapsed for emerging market data package
resolution: Subscription renewed, missing rates loaded manually for the day

description: KONDOR nostro break EUR 4.1M, unposted settlement instruction
root_cause: Settlement instruction generated but not released due to approval timeout
resolution: Instruction approved and released, funds settled same day

description: CALYPSO equity dividend break, 200 accounts short credited
root_cause: Dividend rate loaded net instead of gross, tax calculated twice
resolution: Gross rate reloaded, shortfall credited to all affected accounts

description: MUREX feed to risk system delayed 2 hours, VaR calculation stale
root_cause: Network timeout between MUREX and risk system
resolution: Network route fixed, feed replayed, VaR recalculated on time

description: SWIFT message rejected by correspondent, nostro unmatched
root_cause: BIC code in payment instruction outdated after bank merger
resolution: BIC updated in standing settlement instructions, payment resent

description: OPTIMA repo collateral substitution not reflected in positions
root_cause: Substitution event not processed by overnight batch
resolution: Substitution applied manually, counterparty confirmed new collateral

description: GLRS multi-currency account break, netting applied incorrectly
root_cause: Netting configuration changed without updating GLRS rules
resolution: GLRS netting rules updated, break reversed, account balanced

description: SUMMIT prime brokerage break, client position overstated
root_cause: Client trade cancel not propagated to prime brokerage module
resolution: Cancel applied in prime brokerage, position corrected, client notified

description: CALYPSO IR swap break, floating rate reset not applied
root_cause: LIBOR to SOFR migration setting incorrect for legacy swaps
resolution: Rate setting corrected, reset applied, payment recalculated

description: MUREX FX options position break after system upgrade
root_cause: Upgrade changed delta calculation methodology without config update
resolution: Config restored to pre-upgrade setting, positions recalculated

description: BLOOMBERG bond reference data missing for 300 new ISINs
root_cause: New ISINs not yet loaded in Bloomberg, trades held in enrichment queue
resolution: ISINs loaded manually from prospectus data, trades released

description: KONDOR nostro break caused by timing difference in CLS settlement
root_cause: CLS settlement reported one day ahead of value date in KONDOR
resolution: Timing adjustment applied in KONDOR config, break will not recur

description: OPTIMA margin call not generated for 3 counterparties
root_cause: Threshold breach below minimum transfer amount setting
resolution: MTM setting corrected, margin calls generated and sent

description: GLRS nostro USD break USD 8.2M, month end accruals
root_cause: Month end accrual batch ran before all trades booked
resolution: Batch rerun after trade cut-off, accruals complete

description: MUREX feed failure at quarter end, regulatory report delayed
root_cause: Quarter end batch overran, feed queue backed up
resolution: Feed priority increased for regulatory feeds, report submitted on time

description: CALYPSO cash break on structured note coupon payment
root_cause: Coupon schedule loaded with wrong frequency
resolution: Schedule corrected, missed coupons paid, future payments verified

description: SUMMIT custodian break on newly onboarded fund
root_cause: Fund static data incomplete, trades routed to wrong custodian
resolution: Static data completed, trades rerouted, custodian confirmed positions

description: SWIFT payment rejected, beneficiary account closed
root_cause: Standing instruction not updated after counterparty account change
resolution: New account details obtained, payment resent, SSI updated

description: KONDOR FX revaluation break, 50 trades using wrong spot rate
root_cause: Spot rate feed from Bloomberg arrived 30 minutes late
resolution: Revaluation rerun with correct spot rates, P&L updated

description: OPTIMA collateral eligibility break, ineligible bonds posted
root_cause: Eligibility criteria not updated after counterparty agreement amendment
resolution: Ineligible collateral substituted, eligible bonds posted, agreement checked

description: GLRS feed received twice, duplicate postings in nostro accounts
root_cause: Upstream system sent feed twice due to retry logic error
resolution: Duplicate postings reversed, retry logic corrected in upstream

description: MUREX credit limit breach not flagged, trade booked over limit
root_cause: Credit limit table not refreshed after counterparty downgrade
resolution: Limit table refreshed, breach flagged retrospectively, risk team notified

description: CALYPSO nostro break on FX settlement, both legs posted same side
root_cause: FX settlement template configured with incorrect debit credit indicators
resolution: Template corrected, incorrect postings reversed, correct entries posted
